name: in-home-care-platform
description: npm task runner for ALL local dev operations — venv, docker, middleware, portals

scripts.setup:local:all: npm run setup:local:venv:create && npm run setup:local:venv:install && npm run setup:local:portals:install && npm run setup:local:docker:up && npm run db:migrate:all
scripts.setup:local:venv:create: bash -c 'VENV=$HOME/runtime_data/python_venvs/In-Home-Care-Platform; if [ ! -d "$VENV" ]; then echo "[venv] creating conda env at $VENV"; conda create -y -p "$VENV" python=3.13; else echo "[venv] reusing $VENV"; fi'
scripts.setup:local:venv:install: bash -c 'VENV=$HOME/runtime_data/python_venvs/In-Home-Care-Platform; "$VENV/bin/pip" install --upgrade pip && "$VENV/bin/pip" install -r requirements.txt && echo "[venv] all Python deps installed"'
scripts.setup:local:venv:activate: bash -c 'echo "Run this in your shell:"; echo ""; echo "  conda activate $HOME/runtime_data/python_venvs/In-Home-Care-Platform"; echo ""; echo "Or:"; echo "  source $HOME/runtime_data/python_venvs/In-Home-Care-Platform/bin/activate"'
scripts.setup:local:venv:deactivate: bash -c 'echo "Run this in your shell:"; echo ""; echo "  conda deactivate"'
scripts.setup:local:portals:install: npm run setup:local:portal:member && npm run setup:local:portal:admin && npm run setup:local:portal:desktop
scripts.local:middleware:start-all: bash -c 'VENV=$HOME/runtime_data/python_venvs/In-Home-Care-Platform; REPO=$(pwd); PYTHONPATH="$REPO/middleware"; for svc in api_gateway auth_svc member_svc appointment_svc visit_management_svc visit_ingest_svc document_intelligence_svc mcp_gateway slack_svc collection_ingest_svc; do PYTHONPATH="$PYTHONPATH:$REPO/middleware/Microservices/$svc/src"; done; export PYTHONPATH; PIDS=""; PORT=8001; for svc in api_gateway auth_svc member_svc appointment_svc visit_management_svc visit_ingest_svc document_intelligence_svc mcp_gateway slack_svc; do echo "Starting $svc on :$PORT"; $VENV/bin/uvicorn ${svc}.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port $PORT --app-dir middleware/Microservices/$svc/src > /tmp/ihcp_${svc}.log 2>&1 & PIDS="$PIDS $!"; PORT=$((PORT+1)); done; echo $PIDS > /tmp/ihcp_middleware.pids; echo "All middleware started (ports 8001-8009). PIDs in /tmp/ihcp_middleware.pids"'
scripts.local:middleware:stop-all: bash -c 'if [ -f /tmp/ihcp_middleware.pids ]; then kill $(cat /tmp/ihcp_middleware.pids) 2>/dev/null; rm -f /tmp/ihcp_middleware.pids; echo "All middleware stopped"; else echo "No PID file found"; fi'
scripts.local:middleware:status-all: bash -c 'if [ -f /tmp/ihcp_middleware.pids ]; then for pid in $(cat /tmp/ihcp_middleware.pids); do if kill -0 $pid 2>/dev/null; then echo "PID $pid: running"; else echo "PID $pid: not running"; fi; done; else echo "No PID file found — middleware not started"; fi'
scripts.local:portals:start-all: npm run local:portal:member:dev & npm run local:portal:admin:dev & npm run local:portal:desktop:dev & echo 'All portals starting...'
scripts.local:portal:member:build: cd portals/web_apps/member_portal && npx tsc -b && npx vite build
scripts.local:portal:admin:build: cd portals/web_apps/care_admin_portal && npx tsc -b && npx vite build
scripts.local:portal:desktop:build: cd portals/desktop_app/customer_support_app && npx tsc -b && npx vite build
scripts.local:portals:stop-all: bash -c 'if [ -f /tmp/ihcp_portals.pids ]; then kill $(cat /tmp/ihcp_portals.pids) 2>/dev/null; rm -f /tmp/ihcp_portals.pids; echo "All portals stopped"; else echo "No PID file found"; fi'
scripts.local:portals:status-all: bash -c 'if [ -f /tmp/ihcp_portals.pids ]; then for pid in $(cat /tmp/ihcp_portals.pids); do if kill -0 $pid 2>/dev/null; then echo "PID $pid: running"; else echo "PID $pid: not running"; fi; done; else echo "No PID file found — portals not started"; fi'
scripts.local:start-all: npm run setup:local:venv:create && npm run setup:local:venv:install && npm run setup:local:portals:install && npm run setup:local:docker:up && npm run db:migrate:all && npm run local:middleware:start-all && npm run local:portals:start-all
scripts.local:stop-all: npm run local:portals:stop-all && npm run local:middleware:stop-all && npm run setup:local:docker:down
scripts.local:status-all: npm run setup:local:docker:status && npm run local:middleware:status-all && npm run local:portals:status-all
scripts.local:status:
bash -c 'echo "=== Docker ==="; bash DevOps/Local/docker-all-status.sh 2>/dev/null | tail -n +1; echo; echo "=== Middleware (port healthz probe) ==="; for entry in api_gateway:8001 auth_svc:8002 member_svc:8003 appointment_svc:8004 visit_management_svc:8005 visit_ingest_svc:8006 document_intelligence_svc:8007 mcp_gateway:8008 slack_svc:8009; do svc="${entry%:*}"; port="${entry#*:}"; if curl -fs --max-time 1 http://127.0.0.1:$port/healthz >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf "  [running] %-26s :%s
" "$svc" "$port"; else printf "  [stopped] %-26s :%s
" "$svc" "$port"; fi; done; echo; echo "=== Portals (port probe) ==="; for entry in member_portal:3001 care_admin_portal:3002 customer_support_app:3003; do svc="${entry%:*}"; port="${entry#*:}"; if curl -fs --max-time 1 http://127.0.0.1:$port >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf "  [running] %-26s :%s
" "$svc" "$port"; else printf "  [stopped] %-26s :%s
" "$svc" "$port"; fi; done'
scripts.local:member:start: bash DevOps/Local/docker-member-up.sh && bash DevOps/Local/db-migrate-member.sh && bash DevOps/Local/member-middleware-start.sh && npm run local:portal:member:dev
scripts.teardown:local:all: npm run local:stop-all && npm run setup:local:venv:destroy
